data.title: 国际服温泉开发部社团剧情更新
data.summary: [Hot Springs Department Group Story Preview] Sensei! Chapter 1 of the Hot Springs Department's group
data.body:
[Hot Springs Department Group Story Preview]

Sensei!
Chapter 1 of the Hot Springs Department's group story is coming soon!

Meet somewhat heartwarming and sentimental story - quite unlike the Hot Springs Department's usual exploits...

➡️Details: https://youtu.be/TaBCJGKK-Vg
